## What Is This?

_New skill / new agent / new MCP / playbook update / bug fix / other_

## What Real Situation Prompted This?

_Describe the actual gap you hit running a real feature through the model. No need to name specific tickets or systems — a general description of the situation is enough. Hypothetical improvements should wait until they're validated by real usage._

## What Changed

- 
- 

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the section header conventions of existing files (Skills: Purpose / Rules / Required Steps / Evidence Required; Agents: Role / Responsibilities / Constraints / Skills You May Use / Output Format)
- [ ] Does not create overlapping agent lanes — if there's potential overlap, I've updated the Constraints in both the new and existing agent
- [ ] If this is a new MCP: defaults to read-only; write access (if any) is explicitly called out with scope and audit rationale
- [ ] Tested or validated against a real scenario (not just written speculatively)
- [ ] Relevant `ROADMAP.md` entry updated (mark as completed, or remove from near-term if no longer planned)

_Closes #_
